Resonant Symbol Reactors.description: Symbolic structures are embedded into energy fields, allowing meaning itself to regulate and amplify energetic output. Energy systems respond to correct symbolic configuration rather than purely mechanical input.
Resonant Symbol Reactors.gameplay_effect: Energy production becomes dependent on symbolic configuration rather than fixed infrastructure.

Observer-Dependent Terrain.description: Spatial layers exist differently depending on the observer's sensory and cognitive configuration. Terrain is no longer fixed but revealed through perception.
Observer-Dependent Terrain.gameplay_effect: The map changes based on detection capabilities, revealing hidden routes and regions.

Predictive Causality Engine.description: Information patterns are propagated along temporal gradients, allowing systems to act on events before they fully occur.
Predictive Causality Engine.gameplay_effect: Players gain limited foresight, enabling preemptive strategic actions.

Living Energy Grids.description: Energy systems are integrated into living ecosystems, allowing power generation and distribution through biological processes.
Living Energy Grids.gameplay_effect: Energy production becomes self-sustaining and adaptive to environmental conditions.

Memetic Warfare Systems.description: Conflict is conducted through the manipulation of meaning itself. Ideas propagate as weapons, altering perception, morale, and decision-making.
Memetic Warfare Systems.gameplay_effect: Warfare shifts toward influence and narrative control rather than direct confrontation.

Ontological Terraforming.description: Ecosystems are shaped not only physically but ontologically, redefining what kinds of entities can exist within them.
Ontological Terraforming.gameplay_effect: Planets can be transformed into entirely new forms of existence with unique rules.

Reality-Synchronized Infrastructure.description: Infrastructure exists across multiple spatial layers simultaneously, maintaining coherence regardless of spatial distortion.
Reality-Synchronized Infrastructure.gameplay_effect: Structures become immune to spatial disruption and gain multi-layer functionality.

Cognitive Swarm Economies.description: Economic systems emerge from the interaction of countless agents, dynamically adjusting based on collective intelligence.
Cognitive Swarm Economies.gameplay_effect: Economy becomes self-optimizing and adaptive rather than centrally controlled.

Temporal Governance Networks.description: Governance systems operate across multiple temporal states, coordinating decisions that affect past, present, and future simultaneously.
Temporal Governance Networks.gameplay_effect: Policies can influence outcomes across multiple turns retroactively or preemptively.

Etheric Material Intelligence.description: Materials infused with energy fields gain reactive and adaptive intelligence, responding to environmental and operational conditions.
Etheric Material Intelligence.gameplay_effect: Structures and ships become semi-autonomous and self-optimizing.

Symbolic Diplomacy Frameworks.description: Diplomatic systems are built on shared symbolic frameworks, allowing negotiation through meaning rather than language.
Symbolic Diplomacy Frameworks.gameplay_effect: Diplomacy becomes more stable and effective across diverse species.

Emergent Warforms.description: Combat units evolve dynamically during conflict, adapting their structure and tactics in response to opponents.
Emergent Warforms.gameplay_effect: Units improve and change mid-battle, making engagements unpredictable.

Information Topology Networks.description: Information travels along topological pathways, bypassing conventional spatial constraints.
Information Topology Networks.gameplay_effect: Instant communication across distant locations becomes possible.

Chrono-Ecological Systems.description: Ecosystems evolve across time loops, adapting based on past and future states simultaneously.
Chrono-Ecological Systems.gameplay_effect: Planets continuously improve themselves across turns.

Perceptual Warfare Cloaking.description: Units are hidden not by physical means but by manipulating perception. Enemies cannot detect what they cannot perceive.
Perceptual Warfare Cloaking.gameplay_effect: Stealth becomes perception-based rather than detection-based.

Mathematical Invocation Systems.description: Mathematical structures are enacted as rituals, producing direct effects through computation.
Mathematical Invocation Systems.gameplay_effect: Calculations can directly alter game systems and outcomes.

Emergent Identity Networks.description: Identity arises dynamically from system interactions, allowing entities to shift roles and functions fluidly.
Emergent Identity Networks.gameplay_effect: Units and populations can change roles dynamically based on context.

Energy-Driven Evolution.description: Energy availability directly shapes evolutionary pathways, accelerating adaptation and diversification.
Energy-Driven Evolution.gameplay_effect: Biological systems evolve faster based on energy input.

Cross-Reality Communication Systems.description: Meaning propagates across intersecting spatial realities, enabling communication between otherwise disconnected systems through shared symbolic frameworks rather than physical signal.
Cross-Reality Communication Systems.gameplay_effect: Players can communicate across isolated or hidden regions using meaning rather than signal.
